innovations.name: Hansen Sweet Potato™
innovations.description: Industry's first vegetable specifically developed for its unique coloring properties through 10+ years of non-GMO breeding
benefits: more tolerant to pH than other anthocyanins

innovations.name: Arctic Blue
innovations.description: Spirulina from Iceland based on innovative high-tech cultivation process with low carbon footprint
benefits: uses 1% of water and land vs traditional

innovations.name: Jungle Blue
innovations.description: Natural blue color from jagua fruit sustainably sourced from Colombian rainforests

innovations.name: Simply Brown
innovations.description: Clean label brown from apples using gentle cooking process without caramelization
benefits: excellent high pH and temperature stability

innovations.name: I-Colors® Bold
innovations.description: Range of 10 ultrafine, milled powders achieving deeper, richer shades for powder-based applications
benefits: vibrant natural colors for dry applications

innovations.name: FruitMax® Pink 1104
innovations.description: Concentrated 1% betanin red beet powder offering same coloring effect with substantially reduced dosage

innovations.name: FruitMax® Purple 105
innovations.description: Clean-label purple from black carrot and hibiscus designed for modern beverages and confectionery

innovations.name: ColorFruit® Green and Purple Blends
innovations.description: FDA approved green and purple blends based on Jungle Blue for vivid natural alternatives to artificial colors

company.name: Oterra
company.description: World's largest natural food color supplier offering the widest portfolio since 1876, providing nature's true colors to food and beverage industries through unmatched R&D, application expertise, and full control over raw material value chains
company.founded: 1874 as Chr. Hansen, rebranded to Oterra in 2021

key_figures.location_count: 40+ locations for employees, 28 countries with office, lab or production facility

locations.site_name: flagship factory for minimally processed colors
locations.description: Flagship factory for minimally processed colors
Global Expertise Center addressing increasing consumer concerns about food quality
Secna Group in Spain and Italy with expertise in organic caramel and anthocyanins
Diana Food's natural food coloring business with expertise in organic red beet and orange carrot

sustainability.strategy: 2030 Sustainability Strategy focusing on Nature, Climate and People - 'Together towards natural'
targets: science-based GHG reduction targets validated by SBTi
100% renewable electricity at main production sites
initiatives: breeding initiatives for better land use
biotech solutions for lower nature impacts
One Million Trees campaign in India
key_metrics: 84% of Scope 3 from purchased goods and services
over 400 hectares of turmeric and chili under sustainable farming
11,000 hectares transitioned to sustainable land management in Colombia
